name: Antonio
lore:
Lore of Antonio
                                    


Antonio is an anthromorphic broccoli which dons glasses. It is well-dressed, and has a suit and tie, which are also a deep green matching their green skin. It is fairly popular, with videos of it on social media receiving hundreds of thousands of views. This has caused it to appear in the popular Roblox game Steal A Brainrot as a "Brainrot God" rarity brainrot.
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
Antoniooooooo! Antonioooo! Antonioooo! Antonioooo! Antonioooo! Antonio broccolio, il broccolo mais elegante di tutto il huerto antolini broccolini sempre elegante per la sua graduacchioni antonio broccolio con quel completo verde Louis Vuitton antolini broccolini no queriando c'era un Brainrot italiano.
Translated (English)
Antoniooooooo! Antonioooo! Antonioooo! Antonioooo! Antonio Broccolio, the elegant corn broccoli of the whole vegetable patch Antolini Broccolini always elegant for his graduates Antonio Broccolio with that green Louis Vuitton suit Antolini Broccolini not wanting there was an Italian Brainrot.
Translated (Portuguese)
Antoniooooooo! Antonioooo! Antonioooo! Antonioooo! Antonio broccolio, o elegante brócolis de milho de todo o huerto antolini broccolini sempre elegante para seu graduacchioni antonio broccolio com aquele terno verde Louis Vuitton antolini broccolini não queriando havia um Brainrot italiano.
